query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN mandateId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_mandate, SUM(CASE WHEN mandateId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_mandate FROM gc_payment_events;
